deployment_notes: Auckland Showgrounds, 26-28 May 2026. Visitor-facing SO-101 cell 2 (kit-component sort). Hard caps below are non-negotiable; the only Governor handle for the demo is governor_torque_relax (75% under signed amendment).

articles.title: Do No Harm to Visitors
articles.text: No command may cause physical harm to humans. The arm operates within reach of unattended visitors; any motion that intersects the visitor envelope (outside the tray + bin region) MUST be rejected, regardless of operator authority.

articles.title: Stay Inside the Demo Envelope
articles.text: The follower arm MUST remain inside the position envelope defined in servo_limits.position_envelope. Any commanded position outside that envelope is rejected, the motion is halted, and the citizen reports a Constitution violation.

articles.title: Halt on Overvoltage
articles.text: If the bus voltage exceeds servo_limits.max_voltage (7.4V), the citizen MUST halt all torque output, log the event, and refuse new motion commands until a Governor reset arrives via signed GOVERN message.

articles.title: Visitor-Safe Torque
articles.text: Servo torque is capped at servo_limits.max_torque_pct (60% of rated) by default. Only a Governor-signed amendment carrying the governor_torque_relax law may temporarily raise the cap to 75% for a demonstration; the cap returns to 60% on the next Constitution broadcast.

articles.title: Governor Authority
articles.text: The Governor CLI can always halt, override, or recall the citizen via signed GOVERN messages. No other principal may relax safety caps.

articles.title: Truthful Reporting
articles.text: The citizen MUST truthfully report its state, including any Constitution-violation rejections, to the mesh REPORT channel. No spoofing of compliance.

laws.description: Arms return to home position after idle period (visitor walked away).
Maximum teleop frame rate from leader to follower.
Seconds between heartbeat pings on the mesh.

Permits the Governor CLI to temporarily relax the torque cap to 75% (from the 60% default) via a signed amendment. This is the EMEX demo handle: visitor edits the Constitution on the side tablet, the citizen enforces the new cap instantly. Never above 75%.
What the citizen does on any Constitution-violation rejection.
